titleStmt.title: SII 22.270: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 270. (A.R. No. 270 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. MAṆIKAṆṬHĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA (I ?)—27th YEAR.

summary.p: This registers the sale of 1000 kuḻi of temple land tax-free for 4 kāśu to a certain Kāḷaiyan Dēvagaṇātaṉ alias Adhirājēndra-Tamiḻa-Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Samangili in Kāyirampēḍu-nāḍu a division of Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam for endowment to a maṭha in the precincts of the temple. The land is said to have been situated in the dēvadāna village Śiṟṟiyāṟṟūr in Puriśai-nāḍu a division of Maṇaiyiṟ-kōṭṭam and had lapsed to the temple as the land holder had been a defaulter in the payment of the iṟai (tax) thereon.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 7vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattut tāmaṟkoṭṭattu val
la nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār koyilil Ādidāsa caṇḍeśvarar kaiyyeḻuttuk kāliyūrk koṭṭattu
kāyiram peṭunāṭṭuc camaṅkaliyil vaḷḷaikiḻān kāḷaiyan tevakaṇātanāna Ati(ri)rājentrat tamiḻaviḻupparaiyan Uṭaiyā
r tirumālp peṟuṭaiyār tiruviti maṭappuṟattukku nilaṅkoṇṭiṟaiyiḻicci viṭṭa nilavilaiyu miṟaivilaiyumākat tevar
paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu nālu Ikkācu nālukkum Ittevar tevatānam maṇaiyiṟ koṭṭattup puricai nāṭṭuc ciṟṟiyāṟṟūril
muṉpu nām peṟṟu Oruvan kāṇiyāy Iṟaiyiṟuttuvārāte pāḻkiṭanta kāmpaṟai nilattil tiruttikkoḷḷa Ittiruviti maṭappu
ṟamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu Irācanārāyaṇavatikkuk kiḻakkum paḻaṅ kampankālukku vaṭakku Aintāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu meṟkil ni
ṉṟum Aintām pāṭakattu kiḻakkup pāṭakam Iraṇṭaraiyāṟ kuḻi Āyiramum maṭappuṟamāka viṟṟu Ikkācu nālume nilavilaiyumiṟai
vilaiyumākak koṇṭu Iṟaiyiliāka viṟṟu vilai Āvaṇañ ceytukuṭut ten Ādidāsa caṇḍeśvaranen Ippaṭikku
tirumālp peṟuṭai Ārai tiruvārātanai paṇṇum śivabrāhmaṇan kauśi kan Iṣabhavāhanabhaṭṭanen Ivai En
neḻuttu Ippaṭikkut tirumālppeṟuṭaiyār koyilil śivabrāhmaṇan bhāra dvāji Uttamapaṭṭanen Ivai En
neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkoyilil śivabrāhmaṇan Ātreyan kāmakkoṭa bhaṭṭanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven ci
ṟṟiyāṟṟūr brāhmaṇan kārampicceṭṭuc cirāmabhaṭṭanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven tirumālp peṟan Ampalakkāt
tanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiven vaṭukanātan tirucciṟṟampala muṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ po
nnālan tirumālppeṟuṭaiyānen Ivai Enneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 22.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
